ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the employee */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the employee */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the employee's residence */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the employee's residence */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the employee's residence */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the employee's residence */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the employee */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the employee */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the employee */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the employee's emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee's emergency contact */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or job title of the employee */,
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the office where the employee works */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department where the employee works */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the employee */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the employee started working */,
  "salary" REAL /* Annual salary of the employee */,
  "extension" INTEGER /* Extension number for employee contact */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee's manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_office_id FOREIGN KEY ("office_id") REFERENCES offices ("office_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offices" (
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each office */,
  "office_name" TEXT /* Name of the office */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the office */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries related to the office */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the office */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the office */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the office */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the office */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the office */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the office */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("office_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "head_id" INTEGER /* ID of the head of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_head_id FOREIGN KEY ("head_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee being reviewed */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance review */,
  "score" REAL /* Score given in the review */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or feedback from the reviewer */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer */,
  "review_type" TEXT /* Type of review (e.g., Quarterly, Annual) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salary_histories" (
  "salary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary entry */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee for whom the salary is recorded */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the salary became effective */,
  "salary_amount" REAL /* Amount of the salary */,
  "salary_type" TEXT /* Type of salary (e.g., Basic, Bonus) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salary_histories_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benefits" (
  "benefit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benefit entry */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee receiving the benefit */,
  "benefit_type" TEXT /* Type of benefit (e.g., Health, Dental, Retirement) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the benefit */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the benefit */,
  "provider" TEXT /* Provider of the benefit */,
  "coverage_amount" REAL /* Amount of coverage provided by the benefit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benefit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benefits_provider FOREIGN KEY ("provider") REFERENCES benefit_providers ("provider_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benefits_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_training" (
  "training_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training program entry */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who attended the training */,
  "training_name" TEXT /* Name of the training program */,
  "date_completed" TEXT /* Date when the training was completed */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the training in hours */,
  "provider" TEXT /* Provider of the training */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_training_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_training_provider FOREIGN KEY ("provider") REFERENCES training_providers ("provider_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_leaves" (
  "leave_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leave entry */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who took leave */,
  "leave_type" TEXT /* Type of leave (e.g., Sick, Vacation) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the leave */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the leave */,
  "number_of_days" INTEGER /* Number of days taken as leave */,
  "leave_status" TEXT /* Status of the leave (e.g., Approved, Rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leave_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_leaves_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee whose attendance is recorded */,
  "attendance_date" TEXT /* Date of attendance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status (e.g., Present, Absent) */,
  "hours_worked" REAL /* Number of hours worked on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_postings" (
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job posting */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department posting the job */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Title of the job being posted */,
  "date_posted" TEXT /* Date the job was posted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the job posting (e.g., Open, Closed) */,
  "job_description" TEXT /* Description of the job */,
  "required_skills" TEXT /* Required skills for the job */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_postings_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job application */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job being applied for */,
  "applicant_name" TEXT /* Name of the applicant */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date the application was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the application (e.g., Under Review, Accepted, Rejected) */,
  "resume" TEXT /* Resume of the applicant */,
  "cover_letter" TEXT /* Cover letter of the applicant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_applications_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES job_postings ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Admin, User) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role mapping */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee assigned the role */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payroll" (
  "payroll_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payroll record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee receiving the payroll */,
  "pay_date" TEXT /* Date of the payroll */,
  "gross_salary" REAL /* Gross salary for the employee */,
  "tax_deduction" REAL /* Tax deduction from the gross salary */,
  "net_salary" REAL /* Net salary after tax deduction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payroll_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payroll_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "taxes" (
  "tax_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax entry */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee paying the tax */,
  "tax_type" TEXT /* Type of tax (e.g., Income Tax, Sales Tax) */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Amount of tax paid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tax_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_taxes_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benefit_providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benefit provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the benefit provider */,
  "provider_type" TEXT /* Type of benefit provided (e.g., Health, Dental) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the training provider */,
  "provider_type" TEXT /* Type of training provided (e.g., Technical, Soft Skills) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)
